verificationForm.intro: Confirm your details to receive the verification code.
verificationForm.secure: Your data is protected and will never be shared.

verifyCodeForm.enterCodeError: Enter the code sent to your email.
verifyCodeForm.resendConnectionError: Server connection error while resending the code.
verifyCodeForm.title: Code verification
verifyCodeForm.description: Enter the code sent to your email.
verifyCodeForm.secure: The code expires quickly to keep your access secure.

chat.introSingular: Welcome to the interview for {{title}}. This interview has {{count}} question. When you are ready, click Start.
chat.introPlural: Welcome to the interview for {{title}}. This interview has {{count}} questions. When you are ready, click Start.
chat.sendError: Could not send your response. Please try again.
chat.noQuestions: This interview does not have questions configured yet.
chat.inputHint: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for newline

hero.descriptionFallback: Explore open opportunities at {{companyName}}, answer at your pace, and submit your application in minutes.

interviews.countNone: No positions available at the moment
interviews.emptyTitle: No open role at the moment.
interviews.emptyDescription: Check back soon or contact the recruiter.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: In three steps, pick a role, answer at your pace, and submit your application without friction.

steps.title: Choose the role
steps.desc: Review this company's open opportunities and pick the one that best matches your profile.

steps.title: Answer at your pace
steps.desc: The application runs in a conversational format, making the experience simple, natural, and straightforward.

steps.title: Submit application
steps.desc: After you finish, your responses are ready for the recruiting team to review.
